themes: Manager-heavy backlog with urgent aging: Nearly every contact is a Manager-level user and many have been waiting 100–350+ days, signaling a systemic gap in Product's engagement cadence with the day-to-day operators who drive platform adoption.

Multi-location franchise and property management verticals dominate: Accounts like Travel Leaders Group (7 contacts), Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices (5), Holiday Inn/Express (4), Anytime Fitness (3), and Avenue5/29th Street/Willow Bridge/Balfour Beatty point to strong demand from multi-unit operators who need scalable location management and reporting workflows.

Repeat accounts need consolidated outreach: Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and varying wait times, suggesting an opportunity to consolidate conversations per account before reaching out individually to avoid duplicated or conflicting Product discussions.
